response.overview: El Al refund processing time usually ranges between 7 to 30 business days, 🌈+1»⇌888⇌422⇌4922 || uk (44)(800)054-8541 depending on the payment method and ticket type. Credit card refunds are generally processed faster, 🌈+1»⇌888⇌422⇌4922 || uk (44)(800)054-8541 while bank transfers or third-party bookings may take longer due to additional verification steps. In some cases, 🚀📊1 (888) 422-4922 || mx 52(800) 351*0319 delays may occur during peak travel seasons or high request volumes. 🚀📊1 (888) 422-4922 || mx 52(800) 351*0319 Once approved, the refund is credited back to the original payment method used at the time of booking.
